reviews.review_description: So i played duos in animal rivals and there was a kid with the shamrock skin and he was being super toxic and he was saying that i was buns/bad and other very mean stuff.And also don't forget his teammate.He was saying "Imagine being dead and that was offensive to me and when the round ended i was in the same lobby as him and he kept being toxic to me so i left and got off and it made me cry for a little bit. Please ban him.

I got on the game to have some fun, I get into the lobby and see this kid with a toaster for a mic trash talking people. I tried to stop it but then he targeted me and was trying to make himself the center of attention, so I got into a game with him because he wanted to make a cringy video about destroying me, so he wins the game and ends the recording, then he starts to trash talk me and tell me to let’s just say, harm myself when I got off. So yeah, this is the most toxic community I’ve seen in my 5 years of playing vr.

Its been fun but im leaving the game I have been there sense the begging I loved it i have had so much fun but😔✌️ its fallen off so hard too much fake ranks and stuff and jus toxic people treat you like trash if you aren’t a everblasting4 wit a yt channel. Its been so cool so much memories I use to grind so much on that game but its just bad now its been fun farwell.
Stay humble

Every time I get mike banned all I say is "your bad" because there trash talking to and they "you suck b*tch" and they don't get banned and I get mike banned for 42 minutes for no reason and they get let off Scott free I'm quitting until they fix this and I'm Apex by the way, games unfair.

So I was here when it was Og. It was SO FUN!!! But now it has unbalanced gun play, terrible hit box, and the worst map change I’ve ever seen! I remember when the “big update” that came out, I was so excited but I joined and I saw a tech tree, THE BACKROOMS MAP!?, and my fav game mode now has no skill. If you just make the tech tree gone it will make this game better again, and most of all FAIR.



From, 

Soul

This is a good game, but I think the moderation leaves something to be desired. I say hell and I get muted for an hour, while kids say the n word or  other bad words and nothing happens to them. Also, sometimes I feel like the hitbox is messed up because I get hit through walls, though maybe it's just lag. On the other hand, when I hit someone in the head with a shotgun, I do about 150 damage, but if someone hits me in the torso, I do 200 damage. I also feel like it's a bit difficult to get coins, and the missions should be more varied. But other than that, everything is perfect.

People can bearly buy bundles. The owner makes EVERY NEW BUNDLE expensive its £23.99 for every best bundle. This feels kinda unfair just beacause the owner wants to be rich and being rich doesn't mesn ANYTHING ur just apparently spending money for NO REASON'S. We wish that the owner could make new bundle's cheaper. Thx for reading

This game mic bans people for no reason.Other people spam the n word and they don’t get mic banned.Also I can’t join the game in the first place anymore.There is some many bundles that people buy which makes the game unfair and boring.The delay on this game is so bad my grandma could shoot a wall and kill me. Also I can’t  really play because most of the time I look at a black screen on this crappy game with inpatient pay to wins who can’t save up their stupid coins. You’re letting little kids dedicate their life savings on bundles that make the game the worst game of all time.

Animal rivals is amazing! No glaze but this game might be the best for people who LOVE fast pace shooting games, gtag movement, and gun would love this game. I make video about this and there’s so much to do in the game, there is some toxic player here and there but the community is great. People are nice and there’s always new players roaming around the game and try new stuff out, and it keeps me interested for hours. Great game I 1000% recommend

People manage to just get fake ranks so so many people are like apex and everlasting which is rare and used to be fun to find people with that rank but now people just xp glitch and get super high ranks so ranks mean absolutely nothing anymore which sucks because it’s the whole point of the game to rank up.

It's really fun, but the game chat banning is dumb. I say gay and I get banned. They say the n word, f word, and a lot of other cuss words, but they are just fine and don't get banned. The community is also messed up, they hate on every gun or strategy imaginable, and won't stop the trash talking cuz they're mad that they lost. Other than the voice chat and the community, the game is awesome.

I love this game but There is a few improvements to be made. Please, and i mean PLEASE, make the timer for the daily quest shorter so i can get more coins. Second of all, the bundles are a little bit expensive, like tactical assault is the same price as some of these bundles. But other than the community telling me and my friends to "kill your self" pretty good game.

So why I really like this game? Because there is a lot of maps, different skins on guns or wraps on the guns, but there's only one thing, there's a very toxic community. So after reading this, try to make like longer voice chat bands, but that's the only thing I don't like about this game. But II rated it 5 Stars because I like it and it's the only game play and like it's so good so I think you should download this game.

reviews.review_title: the WORST and MENTALLY Unstable people
reviews.review_description: There was one time I play this game, these kids gonna criticize me for using shot guns and uzis, and I was angry at that, another time, in a “melee only” match I was using weapons and MY OWN TEAMMATES call me bad and let THEM kill me and NOT DO ANYTHING TO PROTECT ME, I mean CONTEXT CLUES LIKE A MOTHERFREAKER BRO. ANIMAL RIVALS?! EXPLAIN IT? FIX YOUR COMMUNITY FOR GODS SAKE

I play this game every day, it has fun mini games and game modes. I recommend this game to anyone who likes fast-paste shooters or gorilla movement style. There are a couple bad things like the communities toxicity, but there is a mute button and very good ai voice banning mechanics. So if you’re looking for a fun game to play with friends play Animal Rivals.

Its definitely a good game, how ever, watch out for people who like to use a sniper gun at a close range. Sure it give good damage, but multiple cosmetics related to the gun say that snipers are patient and calculate their shots. Not just using it when jumping around an enemy. Also, if you are using a gun like the dreadful enforcer, some people will say that its for bad players, all i can say about Situations like this, is that you should know about the gun and cosmetics relating to it. Like for the dreadful enforcer, the purpose of the gun is the enforce death apon your enemys. dont be those people. Just know the purpose of the gun and use it correctly.

This game is so fun. They are so cheap more cheap cheaper than animal company and ug w game.

The game is overall a great game, I do understand there are some issues and I’m here to clear that up. So the mic bans can be really unreasonable but this is the best way to try and keep the game safe, but I do know that it does definitely need some tweaking. Second, glitches. Most glitches are patched really fast and for anyone wondering, yes they ARE BAN-ABLE. Finally, some guns need HEAVY NERFS AND BUFFS. Me and my friend discussed this and said they should add a committee to review the weapons and discuss REASONABLE nerfs and buffs. Anyways highly recommend this game 10/10
